channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: What Marco Rubio Told NDTV On "Imminent" US Strikes On Iran

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio is in India for a four-day visit.

item.description: Rubio told NDTV that US President Donald Trump prefers to solve these two problems - the nuclear issue and opening the Strait of Hormuz through a negotiated agreement and diplomacy.
item.content:encoded: Rubio told NDTV that US President Donald Trump prefers to solve these two problems - the nuclear issue and opening the Strait of Hormuz through a negotiated agreement and diplomacy.

item.title: An Ebola Treatment Tent Set Ablaze Again In Eastern Congo With 18 Suspected Cases Escaping
item.description: On Thursday, another treatment center in the town of Rwampara was burned down after family members were prohibited from retrieving the body of a local man.
item.content:encoded: On Thursday, another treatment center in the town of Rwampara was burned down after family members were prohibited from retrieving the body of a local man.

item.title: "It's Not About India": Marco Rubio To NDTV On New US Greencard Rule

media:content.media:description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio speaks to NDTV's Vishnu Som

item.description: "Well, it's not about India. It's about the whole world," US Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NDTV today on the new green card policy
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103336/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Well, it's not about India. It's about the whole world," US Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NDTV today on the new green card policy

item.title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: "Iran War Will Be Solved One Way Or The Other": Marco Rubio To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: 'Dont Call Me Dumb. Call Me A Brilliant Tyrant Dictator': Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump has boasted about 'acing' cognitive tests multiple times

item.description: US President Donald Trump, while speaking to supporters in New York on Friday, said that he hates the insult "dumb" so much that he asked his doctor for a test that he can take to prove critics wrong.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump, while speaking to supporters in New York on Friday, said that he hates the insult "dumb" so much that he asked his doctor for a test that he can take to prove critics wrong.

item.title: Worst Coal Mine Disasters In China Since 1950

media:content.media:description: China saw its worst coal mine explosion in over 16 years.

item.description: A gas explosion at Liushenyu coal mine in China's northern Shanxi province late on Friday killed at least 90 people.
item.content:encoded: A gas explosion at Liushenyu coal mine in China's northern Shanxi province late on Friday killed at least 90 people.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Blames US 'Excessive Demands' As Fresh Strike Fears Loom

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: 'Nobody Can Outdo Us In Violence': Students' Party To Bangladesh PM After Supporters Clash

media:content.media:description: The National Citizen Party emerged from the protests of 2024

item.description: According to locals in Jhenaidah, an egg was thrown at National Citizen Party chief coordinator Nasiruddin Patwary, leading to clashes in Jhenaidah town between two groups
item.content:encoded: According to locals in Jhenaidah, an egg was thrown at National Citizen Party chief coordinator Nasiruddin Patwary, leading to clashes in Jhenaidah town between two groups

item.title: Ivanka Trump Assassination Plotted As Revenge Killing For Qasem Soleimani

media:content.media:description: The man had a map and blueprint linked to Ivanka Trump's Florida residence.

item.description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi had allegedly pledged to kill Ivanka in retaliation for the 2020 US drone strike in Baghdad.
item.content:encoded: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi had allegedly pledged to kill Ivanka in retaliation for the 2020 US drone strike in Baghdad.

item.title: Meet Kevin Warsh, "Pro-Crypto" Man Replacing Jerome Powell As US Fed Chief

media:content.media:description: The 55-year-old was also considered for the Fed chair role during Donald Trump's first term.

item.description: Born in New York in 1970, Warsh was also considered for the Fed chair role during Donald Trump’s first term.
item.content:encoded: Born in New York in 1970, Warsh was also considered for the Fed chair role during Donald Trump’s first term.

item.title: Parents Arrested After Children Found Abandoned in Portugal, 1,300 Miles from Home

media:content.media:description: Local residents said the boys appeared frightened and exhausted.

item.description: A mother and stepfather have been arrested in Portugal after allegedly abandoning two young brothers in remote woodland nearly 1,300 miles away from their home in France.
item.content:encoded: A mother and stepfather have been arrested in Portugal after allegedly abandoning two young brothers in remote woodland nearly 1,300 miles away from their home in France.

item.title: US Woman Fatally Mauled By Neighbours' Pit Bulls Despite Previous Complaints

media:content.media:description: US Woman Fatally Mauled By Neighbours' Pit Bulls Despite Previous Complaints

item.description: Neighbours told local media that the dogs had allegedly displayed aggressive behaviour in the past and were often seen roaming freely in the area.
item.content:encoded: Neighbours told local media that the dogs had allegedly displayed aggressive behaviour in the past and were often seen roaming freely in the area.

item.title: Queen Elizabeth II's Zardozi Gown From India Tour Takes Centrestage In UK

media:content.media:description: The silk dress was embellished with lace, pearl beads, crystals and sequins.

item.description: The gown was designed by Norman Hartnell, Dressmaker to the Queen, for a state dinner hosted by then President Dr Rajendra Prasad in Delhi in January 1961.
item.content:encoded: The gown was designed by Norman Hartnell, Dressmaker to the Queen, for a state dinner hosted by then President Dr Rajendra Prasad in Delhi in January 1961.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard Was Forced To Quit As Intel Chief? What White House Said

media:content.media:description: White House pushed back at a report that Gabbard had been forced out

item.description: Gabbard, 45, said she was quitting as Director of National Intelligence to care for her husband, Abraham Williams, after he was recently diagnosed with an "extremely rare form of bone cancer."
item.content:encoded: Gabbard, 45, said she was quitting as Director of National Intelligence to care for her husband, Abraham Williams, after he was recently diagnosed with an "extremely rare form of bone cancer."

item.title: Ukraine's "Call Of Duty" Style War System Rewards Troops For Russian Kills

media:content.media:description: Frontline Ukrainian units are ranked on a leaderboard much like the popular game Call of Duty.

item.description: The system, called ePoints and launched in 2024, tracks battlefield performance using data submitted by Ukrainian units.
item.content:encoded: The system, called ePoints and launched in 2024, tracks battlefield performance using data submitted by Ukrainian units.

item.title: "Kill Yourself": JPMorgan Executive Gets Abusive Texts After "Sex Slave" Case

media:content.media:description: JPMorgan has rejected Chiraya Rana's allegations against Lorna Hajdini

item.description: Lorna Hajdini accused Chirayu Rana of inventing claims of sexual harassment and attempting to damage her reputation for “leverage to extort millions of dollars.”
item.content:encoded: Lorna Hajdini accused Chirayu Rana of inventing claims of sexual harassment and attempting to damage her reputation for “leverage to extort millions of dollars.”

item.title: Epstein's Long-time Assistant Lists 3 Names Accused Of Sexual Abuse: Report

media:content.media:description: Sarah Kellen also spoke about Epstein's relationship with Trump.

item.description: James Comer said Kellen’s testimony provided investigators with “new names” that were previously unknown to the panel.
item.content:encoded: James Comer said Kellen’s testimony provided investigators with “new names” that were previously unknown to the panel.

item.title: Viral 'Donald Trump' Albino Buffalo Sold For Eid Sacrifice In Bangladesh

media:content.media:description: The viral celebrity was sold on a live-weight basis to a trader in the Old Dhaka region.

item.description: The four-year-old animal is a rare albino variety featuring a distinct pinkish hue and a unique tuft of hair.
item.content:encoded: The four-year-old animal is a rare albino variety featuring a distinct pinkish hue and a unique tuft of hair.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Rubio Is In India, But Trump's America Just Launched Its Sharpest Attack On Indian Immigrants
item.description: As US Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in India for the Quad meeting and strategic consultations, the Trump administration is preparing one of the sharpest reversals of long-standing American immigration policy in decades.
item.content:encoded: As US Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in India for the Quad meeting and strategic consultations, the Trump administration is preparing one of the sharpest reversals of long-standing American immigration policy in decades.

item.title: US Death Row Inmate's Execution Postponed After Staff Fails To Find Vein

media:content.media:description: Medical issues with IV line cause Tennessee to postpone Tony Carruthers' execution.

item.description: Tennessee delays Tony Carruthers execution after staff members fail to establish a backup IV line for lethal injection.
item.content:encoded: Tennessee delays Tony Carruthers execution after staff members fail to establish a backup IV line for lethal injection.
